decisions.title_en: US government orders Anthropic to suspend Fable 5 and Mythos 5 over jailbreak/national security
decisions.reason: story_key published 2026-06-09 (public release of Fable 5 / Glasswing Mythos). New development: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick issued an export-control directive (June 12, 5:21pm ET) barring all foreign-national access; Anthropic disabled both models entirely for all users to comply. First-ever US export-control action against a commercially deployed LLM. Not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: Bezos's Prometheus raises $12B at $41B valuation to build an 'artificial general engineer'
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Distinct from flourish-brain-inspired-ai (2026-06-04). Series B announced June 11, co-led by Bezos and Vik Bajaj.

decisions.title_en: Neura Robotics raises up to $1.4B Series C led by Tether at $7B valuation
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Largest full-stack robotics round; backers include Tether, Nvidia, Amazon, Qualcomm, Bosch, Schaeffler, EIB.

decisions.title_en: SpaceX SPCX debuts +25% at $168.70; S-1 reveals $41.3B cumulative loss and $6.36B 2025 xAI operating loss
decisions.reason: story_key published 2026-06-04 and 2026-06-12 (pricing/listing). New development: actual first-day trading result (closed +25% at $168.70, intraday $150-$176.52) and S-1 financial disclosures ($41.3B cumulative loss, 2025 revenue $18.67B / net loss $4.94B, xAI segment $6.36B operating loss). Prior items covered pricing only, not results.

decisions.title_en: EngineAI files confidentially for Hong Kong IPO as China humanoid listing wave widens (Unitree $7B)
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. EngineAI HK confidential filing reported June 12; Unitree, PaXini Tech, Dreame, Linkerbot also pursuing listings.

decisions.title_en: Google launches Gemini 3.5 Live Translate: real-time streaming speech translation in 70+ languages
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Consumer app live globally on Android/iOS June 9; streaming model, 70+ languages, 2000+ combinations, Listening Mode.

decisions.title_en: Waymo buys Apple's Project Titan Arizona proving ground for $220M
decisions.reason: Deal recorded June 5 in Maricopa County filings, first reported June 8 by TechCrunch. Underlying event 8-9 days before 2026-06-14, exceeds 5-day limit.

decisions.title_en: Google releases Gemma 4 12B multimodal open model under Apache 2.0
decisions.reason: Released June 3, 11 days before today (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: Microsoft unveils seven homegrown MAI models at Build 2026
decisions.reason: Announced June 2 at Build, 12 days before today (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: Anthropic expands Amazon compute deal to 5GW with $100B AWS commitment
decisions.reason: Announced April 20-21; resurfaced in June recaps but no new development. Far outside 5-day window.

decisions.title_en: Ramp AI Index: Anthropic overtakes OpenAI in US business adoption
decisions.reason: The first-time-overtake milestone was reported around May 13 (Axios). The June 13 aggregator recaps May data; no fresh June development within 5 days.

decisions.title_en: Nvidia buys Groq assets for ~$20B in largest deal ever
decisions.reason: Announced December 24, 2025; appeared in search but is roughly six months old.

decisions.title_en: GPT-5.6 'Kindle' alpha checkpoint leak spotted in Codex
decisions.reason: Unconfirmed leak/rumor dated 'early June' with no official OpenAI confirmation; speculative and not a verifiable dated event within window.

decisions.title_en: Google DeepMind releases DiffusionGemma text-diffusion model
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-06-10 in lookback with full coverage. No substantively new information.
